narrative:
21 Ohio House district has 87,213 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 6.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 38.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 32.5 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +12.2% D−R vs +43.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
